description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house set on a landscaped lot with a driveway leading to a garage and a main entrance facing the street. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of materials including concrete, glass, and wood, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property is bordered by greenery, including trees and shrubs, and includes a backyard area with open lawn space. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially cantilevered over the lower level, creating shaded outdoor areas. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others in smaller groupings. The entryway is defined by a paved path, a covered porch, and a prominent front door.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, backyard, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the cantilevered upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, prominent front door, paved path, and minimal decorative elements
